name: Movie Bot
description: A Telegram bot for searching and sharing movies.

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID. Get it from https://my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API Hash. Get it from https://my.telegram.org

BOT_TOKEN.description: Your Bot Token. Get it from @BotFather on Telegram

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram User ID. Get it from @MissRose_bot by sending /id

DATABASE_URI.description: Your MongoDB or PostgreSQL database URI (If your bot uses a database)

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Channel ID for bot logs. Make sure the bot is an admin there. (Starts with -100)
